fields.title: #1 â€” GA4 Property Setup & Configuration
fields.description: Set up GA4 property for gimosroofing.com. Enhanced measurement ON (page views, scrolls, outbound clicks, site search, file downloads). Custom events: phone_call_click (tel: link tap), estimate_form_submit (contact/estimate form), whatsapp_click (WhatsApp button), email_click (mailto: links), direction_click (Google Maps/direction links). Conversions: Mark phone_call_click, estimate_form_submit, whatsapp_click as key events. Audiences: "Engaged visitors" (session >30s or 2+ pages), "Service page visitors" (viewed /roofing- or /siding-), "Blog readers" (viewed /blog/). Referral exclusion: payment processors/scheduling tools. Data retention: 14 months. Google Signals: Enable. Link to GSC and Google Ads.

fields.title: #2 â€” Google Tag Manager Setup & Event Triggers
fields.description: Install GTM container on all pages (replace hardcoded GA4 tag). Tags/triggers: GA4 Configuration tag (all pages), Phone click (URL contains "tel:") â†’ phone_call_click, WhatsApp click (URL contains "wa.me" or "whatsapp") â†’ whatsapp_click, Form submission (Form ID or thank-you page) â†’ estimate_form_submit, Email click (URL contains "mailto:") â†’ email_click, Scroll depth (25%, 50%, 75%, 90%) â†’ scroll_depth event, Outbound link click (enhanced measurement). Preview mode test every trigger. Confirm data in GA4 Realtime.

fields.title: #3 â€” Google Search Console Setup & Verification
fields.description: Verify gimosroofing.com (www + non-www, http + https â€” 4 properties or domain-level DNS verification). Submit XML sitemap. Check Index â†’ Pages for issues. Set up email alerts for coverage issues. Confirm no manual actions or security issues. Note baseline: total impressions, clicks, avg CTR, avg position.

fields.title: #4 â€” Bing Webmaster Tools Setup
fields.description: Verify gimosroofing.com in Bing Webmaster Tools. Submit XML sitemap. Import settings from Google Search Console if available. Necessary for Copilot/Bing AI visibility.

fields.title: #5 â€” Google Business Profile Access & Verification
fields.description: Confirm GBP ownership is on business-managed Google account (not personal). Add Arlinda as manager. Confirm business is verified (if not, start verification â€” can take 1-2 weeks). Document: current categories, attributes, services listed, photo count, review count, post count.

fields.title: #7 â€” Full Technical SEO Audit
fields.description: Crawl entire site with Screaming Frog (500 URLs). Audit: Crawlability (3-click depth, orphan pages), Indexation (cross-ref with GSC), Robots.txt (GPTBot, Bingbot, Googlebot, Applebot allowed), XML sitemap (exists, submitted, complete, no 404s), HTTP status codes (404s, redirects, chains, loops), Duplicate content (canonical tags), HTTPS (mixed content, SSL), Page speed (top 10 pages), Core Web Vitals (LCP, INP, CLS), Mobile usability (click-to-call, forms, navigation, text), Structured data (validate with Rich Results Test), Internal linking (avg links/page, orphans, broken), Image optimization (alt text, WebP, size, filenames), URL structure (clean, no params, not too long), Hreflang (confirm no conflicting tags). Deliverable: Technical SEO Audit Report (Critical/High/Medium/Low).

fields.title: #8 â€” Full On-Page SEO Audit
fields.description: Audit every page. Per page check: Title tag (present, unique, keyword + Jacksonville FL, <60 chars), Meta description (present, unique, keyword + CTA, 150-160 chars), H1 (one, primary keyword), H2/H3 hierarchy, Content length (flag <500 words), Content quality (unique vs template), Target keyword mapping, Internal links (in/out), Images (alt text, descriptive, keyword-relevant), CTA (phone, form, click-to-call), FAQ section, Schema. Deliverable: On-Page Audit Report spreadsheet (row per page, Status: Pass/Fail/Needs Improvement, Action Required).

fields.title: #9 â€” Keyword Research & Target Keyword Map
fields.description: Using Ahrefs/Semrush + BrightLocal data. Map every target keyword to a URL (existing or to-be-created). Group into clusters: roof replacement, roof repair, emergency repair, metal roofing, commercial roofing, storm damage, leak repair, tile roofing, flat roofing, shingle roofing, siding, residential roofing, location-specific. Per keyword: volume, current rank, difficulty, competitor rank/position. Identify gaps (high-volume, no page) and cannibalization (multiple pages same keyword). Deliverable: Keyword Map spreadsheet (Keyword, Volume, Difficulty, Current Rank, Target URL, Competitor Rank, Priority, Cluster).

fields.title: #10 â€” Competitor Analysis â€” Top 5 Local Roofers
fields.description: Analyze: primeroofingfl.com (Prime Roofing), kanddroofing.com (K&D Roofing), jackcwilsonroofing.com (Jack C Wilson), + 2 Local Pack competitors. Per competitor: DR, referring domains, backlinks, organic keywords, top rankings, site structure (service/location/blog pages), schema, GBP (reviews, rating, photos, posts, categories), Local Pack keywords, content topics Gimo's missing, backlink sources (suppliers, directories, press), AI visibility (ChatGPT/Perplexity "best roofer Jacksonville"). Deliverable: Competitor Analysis Report with comparison table + "gaps to close" action list.

fields.title: #11 â€” NAP Consistency Audit

fields.title: #12 â€” Backlink Profile Audit

Deliverable: Backlink Audit Report â€” categorized links, toxic links, 30+ link opportunity targets.
